title: COMSOL Model Audit Note
problem: A COMSOL model review can become unreliable if formulas are copied from memory
solution: Review parameters, variables, weak forms, boundary conditions, solver settings,
reusable_rule: Preserve original expressions and domain mappings before interpreting physics.

title: Daily Agent Operation Log
problem: A long-running research task produced many small decisions across manuscript
solution: Convert each operation into source-linked memory cards. Preserve the difference
reusable_rule: Each machine writes additive notes and later merges by review. Do not overwrite

title: Command: research-orbit run-workflow --workflow run_log_diagnoser --input sample_run_log.txt
problem: Command: research-orbit run-workflow --workflow run_log_diagnoser --input sample_run_log.txt Status: failed First error: ProviderNotConfiguredError: openai-compatible requires api base URL, API key, and model environment variables. Context: The operator selected a live provider but did not configure the required environment. Expected diagnosis: Use dry-run for CI or set the provider base URL, key, and model explicitly.
solution: Separate evidence from hypotheses and rank the next checks by reversibility and impact.
reusable_rule: Every diagnosis must list evidence, likely causes, check order, and unknowns.

title: Word And MathType Revision Note
problem: A manuscript edit request includes prose, equation references, captions, and
solution: Create a backup, inspect the selection, enable tracked revisions, and use comments
reusable_rule: If MathType is unavailable, report explicit failure instead of replacing an equation
